title: Optimized MTR
description: Solving the High Resource Consumption Issue of the Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
# Brief introduction
This is an optimization mod specifically designed for the MTR mod. Based on my tests, this integrated package maintains a stable frame rate of 40 FPS during standard subway construction (with station lengths of 150m) on low-end computers, while sustaining frame rates above 37 FPS even during high-frequency train departures. Compared to the original version, it delivers nearly a 40% performance improvement. Note: Higher-end devices experience even better optimization results.
> ~~Actually, this modpack can reach around 100 FPS (it's not that bad).~~
# Feedback
- BUG: cfgxdry@outlook.com
- Suggestion: cfgxdry@126.com
# Attach
- [Tianjin-Metro](https://modrinth.com/mod/tianjin-metro)
- [MTR London Underground Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-tube)
- [Joban Client Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm)
- [Station Decoration](https://modrinth.com/mod/station-decoration)
- [Mishang Urban Construction](https://modrinth.com/mod/mishang-urban-construction/versions)(Some versions have)
- and more（[MTR4.0.2]1.9.0 up）

# Update Notice
 After being on hiatus since July 23, 2025, the modpack has now been updated again.Other versions will be rolled out successively,and Forge version support will be added (Forge users,please wait until [MTR4.0.2] Optimized 1.9.0 is updated before downloading

# Compatibility
- This modpack is intended for client-side use only.
- This modpack prioritizes updates for version 1.20.1. I apologize for not being able to adapt it to other versions in a timely manner.

# [Go to the Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)
- 方便了我自己，也方便了你。
- Great news! MTR 4.0.0 is now available! The 1.20.1 Fabric version got the update too, right at the same time! And don’t worry—other versions will follow with updates soon!
###   My Server’s link:```lrt.xkh2029.dpdns.org:30175```
> You can access this server to test the modpack performance (please join this server according to the modpack version on MOTA).
## *My English isn't very good, so thank you for your understanding if there are any grammar mistakes in the translation.*
